title: Product Manager (Tech)
description: Lead product strategy, user research, and cross-functional teams. Learn how to discover user needs, define roadmaps, run experiments, and drive product success.

nodes.title: Product Management Fundamentals
nodes.description: What is product management? Role definition, product lifecycle, and how PMs fit into tech organizations.

nodes.title: Product Discovery
nodes.description: Identify user problems, market opportunities, and validate ideas before building.

nodes.title: User Research
nodes.description: User interviews, surveys, usability testing, personas, journey mapping, and jobs-to-be-done framework.

nodes.title: User Stories & Requirements
nodes.description: Write effective user stories, acceptance criteria, requirements documents, and PRDs.

nodes.title: Prioritization Frameworks
nodes.description: RICE, MoSCoW, Kano model, impact/effort matrix, and WSJF for feature prioritization.

nodes.title: Product Roadmapping
nodes.description: Create and communicate product roadmaps — timelines, milestones, OKRs, and stakeholder alignment.

nodes.title: Product Analytics
nodes.description: Metrics and KPIs — DAU/MAU, retention, funnel analysis, cohort analysis, and North Star metric.

nodes.title: A/B Testing & Experiments
nodes.description: Design and run A/B tests — hypothesis, sample size, statistical significance, and interpreting results.

nodes.title: Agile & Scrum
nodes.description: Scrum ceremonies, sprints, backlog grooming, story points, velocity, and agile planning.

nodes.title: Stakeholder Communication
nodes.description: Manage stakeholders, run product reviews, create presentations, and align teams around product vision.

nodes.title: Go-to-Market Strategy
nodes.description: Product launches, positioning, messaging, pricing strategy, and marketing coordination.

nodes.title: Feedback & Iteration
nodes.description: Collect user feedback, iterate on features, run retrospectives, and continuously improve the product.

nodes.title: Product Strategy
nodes.description: Vision, mission, competitive analysis, market positioning, and long-term product strategy.

nodes.title: Technical Literacy for PMs
nodes.description: Understand APIs, databases, frontend/backend, infrastructure, and be able to talk to engineers effectively.

nodes.title: Growth Product Management
nodes.description: Growth loops, viral coefficients, activation, retention strategies, and PLG (Product-Led Growth).

nodes.title: Data-Driven Decisions
nodes.description: SQL for PMs, dashboard creation, data-informed decision making, and working with data teams.

nodes.title: Product Leadership
nodes.description: Hiring and mentoring PMs, building product culture, leading product teams, and influencing without authority.

nodes.title: PM Tools & Software
nodes.description: Jira, Notion, Figma, Miro, Amplitude, and other tools used by product managers daily.

nodes.title: AI/ML for PMs
nodes.description: Understanding AI capabilities, ML product management, and building AI-powered features.

nodes.title: Platform Product Management
nodes.description: Developer platforms, APIs, SDKs, and platform thinking — building products for other developers.

nodes.title: Ethics & Responsible Product
nodes.description: Privacy by design, accessibility, inclusive design, dark patterns to avoid, and ethical product decisions.

nodes.title: Pricing & Monetization
nodes.description: Pricing models (SaaS, freemium, usage-based), pricing pages, and revenue optimization.

nodes.title: Competitive Analysis
nodes.description: Analyze competitors, identify differentiation, market positioning, and competitive intelligence.

nodes.title: OKRs & Goal Setting
nodes.description: Objectives and Key Results, goal cascading, tracking progress, and aligning teams.

nodes.title: Working with Design
nodes.description: Design thinking, wireframing, prototyping, design handoffs, and collaborating with UX designers.
